summary: Phase 3c Frontend Architecture Redesign Testing PASSED - All 3 newly migrated pages (AdminScheduledReportsPage, AdminAccountingPage, B2BPortalPage) verified to use PageShell + DataTable + TanStack Query design system patterns correctly. 100% of tests passed. All regression tests on previously migrated pages also passed.
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 Phase 3c migrated pages correctly use PageShell with consistent header pattern (title + description + actions)
AdminScheduledReportsPage: PageShell + DataTable + TanStack Query hooks for scheduled reports CRUD
AdminAccountingPage: PageShell + 3 tabs (Genel Bakis, Otomasyon, Cariler) + 6 KPI cards + DataTable for sync jobs
B2BPortalPage: PageShell + 2 tabs (Quote/Book/Cancel, Rezervasyonlarim) + Account summary + KPI row + Quote form
All TanStack Query hooks properly implemented in /features/reporting/hooks.js and /features/accounting/hooks.js
All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing automation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3c UX Standardization complete. All 3 newly migrated pages successfully tested. Super_admin user lands on /app/admin/dashboard after login. Agency_admin user lands on /app after login. B2B Portal at /app/b2b/portal requires agency credentials. Admin pages at /app/admin/* require super_admin credentials.
